creator: petr.fischer@me.com
text:
Just %subject.

Touch a file named '測試中文' (means test Chinese character), but at ranger it shows 'M-fM-8M-,M-hM-)M-&M-dM-8M--M-fVG0'.

Also try this file name 'ěščřžýáíéĚŠČŘŽÝÁÉ'.

It's sad, ranger is a neat piece of console software.

Maybe it's something with python-27 or some python library, can we cooperate with port dependencies maintainers? How?
